Subject: Follow-up on Product Demo and Pricing Details

Dear [Client's Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I wanted to follow up on the product demo we held on Monday, where we had the opportunity to showcase our solution's capabilities and features. As discussed during the demo, you expressed interest in our automation dashboard and requested pricing details to further evaluate our product.

I am pleased to inform you that we are currently preparing a comprehensive proposal that outlines the pricing structure and implementation plan tailored to your organization's needs. We anticipate sharing the proposal with you by this Friday, and it will include all the necessary information to help you make an informed decision.

In the meantime, if you have any additional questions or concerns regarding our product or the demo, please do not hesitate to reach out to me directly. I am more than happy to address any queries you may have and provide further clarification on our automation dashboard and its benefits.

Thank you for considering our solution, and I look forward to sharing the proposal with you soon. If there's anything else I can provide to support your evaluation process, please let me know.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

Dear [Client's Name],

As per your request, I would like to provide more detailed information about the implementation timeline for the project. Our team has outlined a comprehensive plan that includes key milestones and deadlines, which we believe will ensure a smooth and efficient execution of the project.

In addition to the implementation timeline, you also requested a breakdown of the support options available to you. We offer a range of support packages, including standard, premium, and customized options, each designed to meet the unique needs of your organization. Thank you for considering our proposal, and I look forward to the opportunity to discuss the details with you in more depth.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
